summary: Comprehensive testing of Cost Calculator (PrixRevient) application - French language app for calculating product cost prices with raw materials, labor, overheads, manufacturing trees (sub-recipes), shrinkage (freinte), CSV import, and commercial margin. All 34 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed including login, dashboard, materials CRUD, recipes CRUD, recipe detail with sub-recipes, BOM tree, suppliers, categories, overheads, costs table, comparison, sidebar navigation, and logout.
seed_data_creation: Existing seed data: 6 materials (Farine de blé T55, Sucre, Beurre, Lait, Oeufs, Chocolat noir with freinte %), 3 recipes (Pain de campagne, Pate brisee as semi-fini, Tarte aux pommes using Pate brisee as sub-recipe), 1 overhead (Test - Électricité)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. The app supports: (1) Materials with freinte (shrinkage) percentage, (2) Recipes with is_intermediate flag for semi-finished products, (3) Sub-recipes in recipe detail for BOM tree, (4) Cost calculation with freinte, labor, overheads, (5) Suggested price based on target margin, (6) CSV import for materials, (7) PDF export for recipes, (8) Excel export for all costs, (9) Recipe comparison. Login uses httpOnly cookies (not JWT bearer tokens).

dashboard.stats_cards: PASS - shows materials, recipes, overheads, avg cost
dashboard.recent_recipes: PASS - shows 3 recent recipes with costs

materials.csv_import_dialog: PASS - dialog opens with template download

recipes.create: PASS - with is_intermediate checkbox and target_margin

recipe_detail.cost_summary_cards: PASS - materials, labor, overhead, total, suggested price
recipe_detail.sub_recipes_section: PASS - shows Pate brisee in Tarte aux pommes

costs_table.all_costs_display: PASS - shows all recipes with costs
